info.title: AR | Customer management
info.description:
BILL is a cloud-based cash flow management system for an organization's Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR) automation.
 * **AP**: Automate workflows to pay vendors bills at scale for the goods and services they provide. Pay vendors with a wide range of payment methods. Generate vendor credits, bill credits, and payment disbursement reports.
 * **AR**: Automate workflows to get paid by customers at scale for the goods and services you provide. Generate and send invoices on a schedule, generate customer and invoice credits, and seamlessly charge authorized customers.
 * **Organization**: Manage your bank accounts (for sending and receiving payments), users (with user roles), and sync with your choice of accounting software.

Integrate with the BILL API to send and receive payments for your business. See [Support Center](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us) for resources about using the BILL web app.

post.description:
Create a customer object.

### What is a customer?
A customer is an organization that pays you for goods and services you provide. Vendors and customers using BILL can be connected to each other in the BILL network. Network connections between vendors and customers enable electronic payments between them.

You can create a new customer object with [`/v2/Crud/Create/Customer.json`](ref:ar-customermgmt-createcustomer).

Other customer features:
* Create additional customer contacts with [`/v2/Crud/Create/CustomerContact.json`](ref:ar-customermgmt-createcustomercontact). This is useful when the customer has multiple departments, such as purchasing, sales, and accounting.
* Add a customer bank account with [`/v2/Crud/Create/CustomerBankAccount.json`](ref:ar-customermgmt-createcustomerbankaccount).
* Authorize your organization to charge a customer with [`/v2/SetCustomerAuthorization.json`](ref:ar-customertransactions-setcustomerauthorization). This is required before you can charge the customer (with [`/v2/ChargeCustomer.json`](ref:ar-customertransactions-chargecustomer)).
* `invoiceCurrency` is a required additional field for creating an international customer. When this value is set, invoices can be created for receiving payments from the international customer.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.description:

post.description:
Create a customer contact object.

### What is a customer contact?
When you create a customer with [`/v2/Crud/Create/Customer.json`](ref:ar-customermgmt-createcustomer), one contact is added. You can create additional customer contacts with [`/v2/Crud/Create/CustomerContact.json`](ref:ar-customermgmt-createcustomercontact).

Additional customer contacts are useful when the customer has multiple departments, such as purchasing, sales, and accounting. With multiple customer contacts, you can select one or more contacts for receiving invoices and other communications.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.description:
Create a customer bank account object.

### What is a customer bank account?
The customer bank account is required for your organization to charge the customer (with [`/v2/ChargeCustomer.json`](ref:ar-customertransactions-chargecustomer)). A customer can have only one bank account in BILL.

When you have the required information and authorization from your customer, you can add a customer bank account with [`/v2/Crud/Create/CustomerBankAccount.json`](ref:ar-customermgmt-createcustomerbankaccount).

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

isActive.description:
Object visibility status. Inactive objects are hidden by default in the BILL web app.
* `1`: Active
* `2`: Inactive

shortName.description: Name for identifying the customer in BILL and in your choice of accounting software

parentCustomerId.description: BILL-generated ID of the parent customer. Set this value if the current customer ID is a child object.

accNumber.description: Additional customer account identification number. The number is available in customer invoices and in the BILL web app.

billAddressState.description: Customer billing address state. Two-letter abbreviation for a US state.

billAddressCountry.description:
Customer billing address country.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

shipAddressState.description: Customer shipping address state. Two-letter abbreviation for a US state.

invoiceCurrency.description:
Customer bill currency. Three-letter abbreviation. This field is required for creating an international customer. When this value is set, invoices can be created for receiving payments from the international customer.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

accountType.description:
Customer account type.
* `0`: None
* `1`: Business
* `2`: Person

paymentTermId.description: BILL-generated payment term ID for the customer. The payment term defines when a payment is sent.

defaultDeliveryMethod.description:
Default invoice delivery method.
* `0`: Email
* `1`: US Mail service

isAutoChargeDismissed.description: Set as `true` if customer auto-charge is dismissed

isTaxLiable.description: Set as `true` if the customer is liable for taxes

creationSource.description:
Customer creation source.
* `0`: Unknown
* `1`: BILL web app (UI)
* `2`: BILL web app (UI) search

enabledInvoiceFinancing.description: Set as `true` to enable invoice financing for the customer. See [Invoice Financing FAQs](https://help.bill.com/direct/s/article/10656399312525) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the customer. The value begins with `0cu`.

isActive.description:
Object visibility status. Inactive objects are hidden by default in the BILL web app.
* `1`: Active
* `2`: Inactive

shortName.description: Name for identifying the customer in BILL and in your choice of accounting software

parentCustomerId.description: BILL-generated ID of the parent customer. Set this value if the current customer ID is a child object.

accNumber.description: Additional customer account identification number. The number is available in customer invoices and in the BILL web app.

invoiceCurrency.description:
Customer bill currency. Three-letter abbreviation. This field is required for creating an international customer. When this value is set, invoices can be created for receiving payments from the international customer.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

mergedIntoId.description: Parent customer ID that the current ID is merged into

hasAuthorizedToCharge.description: Set as `true` if the customer has provided authorization for charging the customer

accountType.description:
Customer account type.
* `0`: None
* `1`: Business
* `2`: Person

paymentTermId.description: BILL-generated payment term ID for the customer. The payment term defines when a payment is sent.

hasBankAccount.description: Set as `true` if customer bank account is available

hasNetBankAccount.description: Set as `true` if customer net bank account is available

hasBankAccountAutoPay.description: Set as `true` if customer bank account autopay is available

defaultDeliveryMethod.description:
Default invoice delivery method.
* `0`: Email
* `1`: US Mail service

isAutoChargeDismissed.description: Set as `true` if customer auto-charge is dismissed

isTaxLiable.description: Set as `true` if the customer is liable for taxes

creationSource.description:
Customer creation source.
* `0`: Unknown
* `1`: BILL web app (UI)
* `2`: BILL web app (UI) search

enabledInvoiceFinancing.description: Set as `true` to enable invoice financing for the customer. See [Invoice Financing FAQs](https://help.bill.com/direct/s/article/10656399312525) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

hasCustomerCard.description: Set as `true` if customer credit card is stored for autopay

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the customer. The value begins with `0cu`.

field.description: Field name. See the response body documentation to learn about fields that you can filter with. Filterable fields are marked with `You can filter with this field.`

op.description:
Operator symbol.
* `=`: Equals
* `<`: Less than
* `>`: Greater than
* `!=`: Not equal
* `<=`: Less than or equal to
* `>=`: Greater than or equal to
* `in`: Value in list
* `nin`: Value not in list

asc.description:
Sort order.
* `true`: Ascending order
* `false`: Descending order

nested.description: Set as `true` to include additional nested data in the response

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the customer. The value begins with `0cu`. You can filter with this field.

isActive.description:
Object visibility status. Inactive objects are hidden by default in the BILL web app. You can filter with this field.
* `1`: Active
* `2`: Inactive

createdTime.description: Created date and time. You can filter with this field.

updatedTime.description: Updated date and time. You can filter with this field.

shortName.description: Name for identifying the customer in BILL and in your choice of accounting software

parentCustomerId.description: BILL-generated ID of the parent customer. Set this value if the current customer ID is a child object. You can filter with this field.

accNumber.description: Additional customer account identification number. The number is available in customer invoices and in the BILL web app.

invoiceCurrency.description: Customer bill currency. You can filter with this field.

mergedIntoId.description: Parent customer ID that the current ID is merged into. You can filter with this field.

hasAuthorizedToCharge.description: Set as `true` if the customer has provided authorization for charging the customer. You can filter with this field.

accountType.description:
Customer account type. You can filter with this field.
* `0`: None
* `1`: Business
* `2`: Person

paymentTermId.description: BILL-generated payment term ID for the customer. The payment term defines when a payment is sent. You can filter with this field.

balance.description: Current customer balance. You can filter with this field.

hasBankAccount.description: Set as `true` if customer bank account is available

hasNetBankAccount.description: Set as `true` if customer net bank account is available

hasBankAccountAutoPay.description: Set as `true` if customer bank account autopay is available

defaultDeliveryMethod.description:
Default invoice delivery method. You can filter with this field.
* `0`: Email
* `1`: US Mail service

isAutoChargeDismissed.description: Set as `true` if customer auto-charge is dismissed. You can filter with this field.

isTaxLiable.description: Set as `true` if the customer is liable for taxes. You can filter with this field.

creationSource.description:
Customer creation source. You can filter with this field.
* `0`: Unknown
* `1`: BILL web app (UI)
* `2`: BILL web app (UI) search

enabledInvoiceFinancing.description: Set as `true` to enable invoice financing for the customer. See [Invoice Financing FAQs](https://help.bill.com/direct/s/article/10656399312525) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

hasCustomerCard.description: Set as `true` if customer credit card is stored for autopay

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the customer. The value begins with `0cu`.

isActive.description:
Object visibility status. Inactive objects are hidden by default in the BILL web app.
* `1`: Active
* `2`: Inactive

shortName.description: Name for identifying the customer in BILL and in your choice of accounting software

parentCustomerId.description: BILL-generated ID of the parent customer. Set this value if the current customer ID is a child object.

accNumber.description: Additional customer account identification number. The number is available in customer invoices and in the BILL web app.

billAddressState.description: Customer billing address state. Two-letter abbreviation for a US state.

billAddressCountry.description:
Customer billing address country.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

shipAddressState.description: Customer shipping address state. Two-letter abbreviation for a US state.

invoiceCurrency.description:
Customer bill currency. Three-letter abbreviation.

See [Country information for international payments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007172671) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

* `1`: Business
* `2`: Person

* `1`: US Mail service
